commands.payload:
Aspose.Imaging Image Resize Micro Application 24.3.0.0
Copyright © 2010-2024 Aspose Pty. Ltd

  -p, --project    Path to the project project for the addition of the reference
                   to the MicroApps API.

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.

result.stderr:
Aspose.Imaging Image Resize Micro Application 24.3.0.0
Copyright © 2010-2024 Aspose Pty. Ltd

  -i, --input                Required. Input images paths or url.

  -o, --output               Required. Path to the resized image.

  -f, --format               (Default: jpg) Output image format. Jpeg is default
                             value

  -r, --resize-factor        Relative resize value in percents.

  -W, --width-on-resize      Width of the resulting image in pixels.

  -H, --height-on-resize     Height of the resulting image in pixels.

  -a, --resize-algorithm     (Default: HighQualityResample) Resize type. Allowed
                             values : as per
                             https://reference.aspose.com/imaging/net/aspose.ima
                             ging/resizetype enumeration. Default value is
                             HighQualityResample.

  -b, --background-color     (Default: White) The background color of resulting
                             image. Could be set in using
                             https://reference.aspose.com/imaging/net/aspose.ima
                             ging/color/. Otherwise HTML HEX code expressions
                             are supported (#RRGGBB, #RGB, #RRGGBBAA, #RGBA), as
                             well as special color - transparent.

  -k, --keep-aspect-ratio    (Default: true) Keep aspect ratio on resize

  -l, --license              Path to Aspose.Imaging .NET license file. />.

  -v, --verbose              (Default: false) Verbose output.

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

staticCommands.name: add
staticCommands.description: Add reference to the MicroApps aPI to your project.

options.description: Path to the project project for the addition of the reference to the MicroApps API.

The background color of resulting image. Could be set in using https://reference.aspose.com/imaging/net/aspose.imaging/color/. Otherwise HTML HEX code expressions are supported (#RRGGBB, #RGB, #RRGGBBAA, #RGBA), as well as special color - transparent.
Output image format. Jpeg is default value
Height of the resulting image in pixels.
Resize type. Allowed values : as per https://reference.aspose.com/imaging/net/aspose.imaging/resizetype enumeration. Default value is HighQualityResample.
Width of the resulting image in pixels.
